{{Quote|My memory bank's pretty limited, Chief. You got what you paid for.|Flek|<ref name="Young Lando Calrissian">{{Tales|20|Young Lando Calrissian}}</ref>}}
'''Flek''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] bought cheap by a young [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], who used him for his (scant) knowledge. Flek couldn't swim, and accompanied Lando on a scam operation to the [[Meek]]s. Flek advised Lando that he would never become a scoundrel.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|20|Young Lando Calrissian}} {{1st}}
